mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes the 'GPOS'/'GSUB' tag and version-1 literals from CMP operands into the input, routing the get_lookup_count version switch to case 1 and returning a positive lookup count instead of falling to default:return 0.
one_line: I2S supplies GPOS/GSUB tag and version literal to avoid default return 0

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the sfnt magic and GPOS/GSUB FOURCC operands from CmpLogObserver and stamps them at matching offsets, jumping the multi-byte equality wall so the version switch bypasses default and get_feature_variations is reached.
one_line: I2S stamps sfnt magic and FOURCC to bypass multi-byte equality wall to default

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes the 4-byte GPOS table-tag and feature-tag bytes from CMP buffers into the input, ensuring the LangSys feature-index loop yields a valid i != NOT_FOUND_INDEX for the false branch at get_feature_tag.
one_line: I2S plants GPOS tag and feature bytes so feature-index lookup succeeds

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the GPOS/GSUB FOURCC and sfnt header from CMP buffers and plants them into the input, producing a positive lookup_count so the accelerator loop guard i < lookup_count is taken true; losers never produce a parseable table.
one_line: I2S plants GPOS/GSUB FOURCC and header so lookup_count > 0 for loop

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the 4-byte GPOS/GSUB tag comparison via trace_cmp and substitutes the literal at offset 0x0c, making the GPOS table parse with non-zero lookup_count so the destructor loop iterates; losers lacking the tag have lookup_count 0.
one_line: I2S writes GPOS FOURCC at table offset so destructor loop count is nonzero

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the table script-tag comparison operand and substitutes the exact FOURCC (GPOS, GSUB, latn) into the input so find_script_index matches and the true branch is taken; losers carry no concentrated tag and the lookup always misses.
one_line: I2S supplies FOURCC script tag so find_script_index match succeeds

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the 4-byte table-tag comparison and substitutes the GSUB/GPOS FOURCC into the input, resolving the layout table lookup so get_feature_count returns positive and the for-loop enters its body; losers with no tag have feature_count 0.
one_line: I2S substitutes GSUB/GPOS FOURCC so feature count is positive for loop

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the HB_TAG sfnt table-tag comparison, reads the 'GPOS' constant from CmpLogObserver, and substitutes it at the matching input offset, planting the exact 4-byte tag.
one_line: I2S plants 4-byte 'GPOS' tag enabling GPOS feature-count loop

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads both the sfnt magic and table-tag comparison operands from CmpLogObserver and substitutes the exact 'GSUB'/'GPOS' literals plus sfnt magic bytes into the input, manufacturing the structured header naive/vp cannot assemble by havoc.
one_line: I2S substitutes 'GSUB'/'GPOS' tags and sfnt magic enabling layout table parse

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the 4-byte FOURCC comparison for 'GDEF', records the constant in CmpLogObserver, and substitutes the exact bytes 47 44 45 46 at the table-directory offset, enabling the glyph-class probe; naive/vp lack I2S and never land this exact value.
one_line: I2S plants 4-byte 'GDEF' tag so glyph-class check takes false branch

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the 4-byte tag comparison against 'GPOS', reads the constant from CmpLogObserver, and substitutes 47 50 4f 53 at the table-directory offset, making hb_ot_layout_has_positioning return true; naive/vp must stumble on the exact 32-bit FOURCC by chance and never do.
one_line: I2S plants 4-byte 'GPOS' tag enabling glyph positioning has_gpos branch

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the CMP_MAP'd 'GPOS' tag comparison from CmpLogObserver and substitutes the constant 47 50 4f 53 into the input at the table-record offset, setting apply_gpos true; naive/vp lack I2S and never assemble the 4-byte tag across 10 trials.
one_line: I2S plants 'GPOS' tag setting apply_gpos true for positioning branch

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the sfnt 'GDEF' tag comparison, logs the constant 47 44 45 46 in CmpLogObserver, and substitutes it at offsets 0x0c-0x0f, giving HarfBuzz a real GDEF table that sets fallback_glyph_classes false; losers never carry the tag so fallback glyph synthesis always fires.
one_line: I2S plants 'GDEF' tag preventing fallback glyph-class synthesis at L909

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the sfnt-header version and table-tag comparison operands from CmpLogObserver and substitutes the exact constants (sfnt magic, 'GSUB'/'GPOS') at the right offsets, enabling deep structure traversal that drives check_range to ~110000 invocations; without I2S the table directory never validates and sanitize is barely reached.
one_line: I2S plants sfnt magic and GSUB/GPOS tags enabling deep sanitize-walk invocations

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the multi-byte IPv6-address equality compare, reads the all-thread-nodes multicast address constant from CmpLogObserver, and substitutes it into the destination field; naive/vp must hit the exact 16-byte address by blind havoc, which never occurs in 10 trials.
one_line: I2S plants exact IPv6 all-thread-nodes multicast address for equality check
